modules.sql: SELECT c.card_type, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ct.authorization_status = 'Approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approved_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ct.authorization_status = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined_count, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ct.authorization_status = 'Approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) / CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS approval_rate, ct.ifw_effective_date FROM card_transactions ct INNER JOIN cards c ON ct.card_id = c.card_id GROUP BY c.card_type, ct.ifw_effective_date
